extra.reason: Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.
Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.
Implemented Hono Worker slide editor PoC, MDX-like parser/renderer, and Cloudflare Agents integration seam.
Added honoSlides middleware, exports, tests, and README usage.
Added manifest compile CLI, package bin/script, docs, and tests.
Added createLocalDevSlidesApp helper, filesystem-backed dev router coverage, README usage, and passing check.
Implemented iframe viewer wrapper, fixed-size presentation route, cross-frame controls/state, draft/dev coverage, and passing npm run check.
Implemented AIChatAgent-based SlideAssistant, approval-gated proposal workflow, viewer chat persistence/diff UX, sample docs, and passing bun run check.
Aligned agents to 0.15.0 so @cloudflare/ai-chat can import required agents/chat exports; verified wrangler dry-run bundle and bun run check.
Started local wrangler dev on port 8791 and verified /decks/sample in browser: viewer controls, Hero rendering, chat response, proposal Apply, iframe reload, and editor markdown update.
Implemented public viewer, render route, and edit-scoped controls
Replaced preview event polling with SSE streaming, heartbeat, and edit-preview live reload suppression
Fixed edit page overflow and scaled preview iframe rendering
Implemented tabbed left-pane chat/MDX editor with hono/jsx/dom client tabs and verified sample edit UI.
Completed chat transcript, mode selection, session id, proposal approval card, and apply flow for the edit Agent panel.
Grounded Agent chat in current MDX, inferred edit intent as code mode, rejected ungrounded Workers AI responses, and verified proposal apply flow.
Removed visible consultation/edit mode switch and kept server-side edit intent inference for single chat input.
Displayed proposal patch/replacement changes before Apply and verified proposal card details.
Stored recent JSON chat turns in SlideAssistant state and used them for follow-up edit proposals.
Kept mode detection current-turn-first and handled greetings locally before Workers AI.
Unified edit-mode message and proposal generation around a single edit plan, with regression coverage.
Removed fixed/heuristic chat fallbacks; agent/chat now returns explicit JSON errors when Agent route, Workers AI, or Code Mode cannot produce a usable response. Verified with bun run check.

Code Mode generation now parses proposals from AI SDK tool results and earlier steps, not just final text JSON. Prompt now asks Code Mode to return a proposal object. Sample route covers Agent-returned proposal path. Verified with bun run check.

Browser verification now passes for sample title edit: chat creates a visible proposal, Apply updates MDX and preview iframe. Added explicit title-command proposal path, Code Mode title tool, manual Code Mode tool execution for AI SDK results without toolResults, and tests. Verified with bun run check.
Removed title-biased Code Mode tool/prompting, rejected title-only proposals for non-title instructions, added add-intent coverage, and verified with bun run check plus local chat route checks.

Completed by the same fix as hono_slides-ylo: removed createTitlePatch from Code Mode exposure, removed title-only prompt example, reject title-only proposals for non-title instructions, and verified check/dev route.
Split src implementation files into feature directories and updated imports; bun run check passes.

Preserved edit implementation on feature/edit-layer, removed agent/editor implementation from MVP main, and kept viewer router extension/live-reload hooks for future edit reintegration. Verified with bun run check.
Implemented Bun workspace monorepo with package and basic sample split; verified with bun run check.
Converted the basic example to a directory-based deck manifest flow and verified with bun run check.
Added build-ready dist exports and Node-compatible CLI bin for manifest generation; verified with bun run check.
Separated parser, renderer, compiler, generator, source, and routing modules out of deck; verified with bun run check.
Implemented AST-based MDX parsing, Hono JSX slide component rendering, and client island helper.
Moved the basic sample slide component exports into decks/sample/components and kept the Worker entrypoint as thin wiring.
Implemented --components-out registry generation with hashed deck-local component names.
Renamed package/API to @hono/decks and decksRouter, added defineDecks wiring, and documented style/clientEntry use cases.
Generated src/generated/decks.ts with decksRouter(options), removed the hand-written sample src/decks.ts adapter, and verified with bun run check.
Implemented module-backed @mdx-js/mdx generation, generated decks router, deck-local component wiring, and updated tests/docs.
Added a sample client island Counter component, Worker-served client entry script, tests, and fixed island wrapper rendering.
Reworked the sample client island to bundle a Hono JSX DOM entry with hydrateSlideIslands and useState.
Moved the sample Hono JSX DOM client entry next to the sample deck and updated the client bundle script/docs.
Moved sample client code under components/client and generated bundled client entries from hono-decks compile.
Implemented generated hashed client island registry and removed manual deck-local hydrate registration.
Implemented viewer customization, deckContext, shared viewer parts, docs, sample usage, and tests.
Added sample layout pages and serveDecksClientEntry helper to simplify client entry asset wiring.
Generated decksRouter now auto-serves generated client entry assets from the mounted router, and examples/tests/docs no longer require manual client asset wiring.
Sample pages now use hono/jsx components instead of manual HTML string assembly, and src/**/*.tsx is included in the example typecheck.
examples/basic/src/index.ts is now focused on Hono route composition; sample viewer CSS moved to pages.tsx, empty bindings and app-entry re-export were removed.
examples/basic/src/pages.tsx now uses Hono's hono/css Style/css helper for page CSS while keeping router viewer.style as raw CSS for the package API.
Deck viewer options now support a JSX head slot, sample viewer styling uses hono/css Style via viewer.head, and docs/tests cover the new behavior.
Public render surfaces now use DeckRenderable/MaybePromise Hono JSX types instead of broad unknown, while data parsing unknowns remain intentional.
Added withR2Assets source wrapper, connected basic sample to optional R2 asset binding, documented the pattern, and verified cache header behavior with tests.
Made generated MDX asset URL rewriting idempotent and added regression coverage for plain local asset names.
Added docs/verification-matrix.md and linked it from README to track media, embed, code, animation, accessibility, export, and operational verification cases.
Added docs/verification-priorities.md with recommended implementation order and linked it from the verification matrix.
Removed fixed 1920x1080 iframe/stage sizing from the viewer shell, made iframe follow its parent viewport, and added package/sample regression tests.
Separated render viewport from the 1920x1080 deck canvas and added fitDeck scaling so the canvas scales into the iframe while preserving its aspect ratio.
Added media deck asset verification coverage and local asset cache headers.
Added code deck fenced code coverage, default code block presentation styles, and documented the CodeBlock/highlighting direction.
Validated client island props as JSON values, added failures for non-JSON props with component context, and updated docs.
Added CLI diagnostics coverage for MDX compile failures and wrapped errors with source path and slide index.
Runtime render errors now return clear 500 responses with deck source path and slide index, covered by router tests and docs.
Built-in CodeBlock component and code deck sample are implemented; build-time syntax highlighting remains tracked separately in hono-slides-h0p.
Build-time syntax highlighting now runs through Shiki during generated module compilation; runtime renders generated highlighted HTML without importing Shiki in Worker-safe exports.
Built-in EmbedFrame and media deck examples now cover YouTube and generic iframe embeds with sandbox, lazy loading, permissions, aspect ratio, and fallback links.

Built-in SocialEmbed now provides script-free SNS quote/link fallback, media sample and tests cover X-style content, and README documents app-owned CSP responsibilities for iframe, image, client entry, and third-party SNS scripts.

Standard viewer now has heading metadata, focusable viewport, iframe title coverage, pointer swipe command wiring, reduced-motion CSS in viewer and presentation documents, and docs distinguish package-level coverage from remaining browser/device smoke checks.

Added bun run smoke:viewport browser smoke workflow for the basic example. It starts wrangler dev, verifies sample/code/media render routes, checks desktop and mobile iframe viewport framing, keyboard navigation, browser-side pointer swipe dispatch, control contrast, and writes screenshots outside the repo by default.
Added DeckTheme API for trusted theme styles, components, and slide layout wrappers; documented style/viewer boundaries; covered renderer and router paths with tests.

Added examples/basic/decks/motion with CSS animation, reduced-motion CSS, and a deck-local hono/jsx/dom MotionMeter island; generated router/client modules include the motion deck; sample tests and browser viewport smoke cover it.

Documented slide transition and fragment/step semantics in docs/slide-dynamics.md, added an implementation plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-19-slide-transitions-fragments.md, updated verification docs, and created hono-slides-abt for implementation.
Implemented slide transition and fragment navigation with tests, sample, docs, and smoke verification.
Added a focused basic sample custom DeckSource decorator around withR2Assets, documented the runtime R2 boundary, and covered embedded vs R2 asset headers with tests and viewport smoke.
Implemented Zenn-style embed shorthand and /:::fire reveal syntax with tests, docs, and sample updates.
Added explicit @[embed]/@[iframe] shorthand and single-line URL link handling with sample, docs, generated output, and tests.
Made EmbedFrame fallback links open externally and replaced the media placeholder remote image with an R2-backed generated asset sample covered by tests and viewport smoke.
Made YouTube shorthand keep the iframe embed URL while using the watch URL for the fallback external link.
Added @[x-post](url) syntax, a TweetEmbed built-in component, and media sample coverage for the requested Hono post URL.
Changed @[x](url) to render TweetEmbed by default and removed x-post from the public authoring syntax.
Added build-time best-effort OGP resolution for @[card](url), LinkCard OGP rendering, docs, and tests.
Updated the media deck LinkCard sample and tests to use the requested Zenn article URL.
Updated the media deck LinkCard sample and tests to use https://yusukebe.com/.
Updated LinkCard CSS to use a left thumbnail and right metadata layout with a stacked mobile fallback.
Removed deck padding and made slides border-box in the base presentation styles.
Removed the base slide border radius and added a regression assertion.
Added deployed R2 cache smoke command, sample R2 binding, custom domain route, docs, and tests. Live smoke is blocked until hono-decks-basic.tslab.app DNS provisioning completes.
Viewport smoke now verifies motion fragment progression through iframe DOM/root data attributes while keeping controller text slide-only.
Changed the default viewer position text to slide-only and exposed step state via root data attributes for custom controllers.
Added package print CSS, compiled-render regression coverage, PDF smoke script, root/example scripts, and verification docs.
Changed print output to A4 portrait handout with margins and 3-up slide grouping, updated PDF smoke expectations and docs.
Added /:slug/print route, print preview rendering mode, sample link, PDF smoke route update, and route/docs coverage.
Removed decorative base stage/slide/iframe backgrounds and moved sample deck backgrounds to layout class styling.
Added font-size:32px to the base presentation style and covered it with compiled renderer tests.
Implemented PDF smoke preview rendering with Poppler/Quick Look fallback, documented the flow, and verified with bun run smoke:pdf and bun run check.
Fixed print handout scaling by wrapping slide content and scaling the 1920x1080 slide content into each A4 slot; verified with package tests, smoke:pdf including media, and bun run check.
Removed page-level print and print-preview background colors while preserving slide backgrounds; verified package tests, PDF smoke preview, and bun run check.
Added opt-in Browser Run PDF/PNG export routes using /:slug/print, viewer export links, public types, README docs, and package tests; verified with bun run check.
Added Browser Run binding and export options to examples/basic, documented sample export routes, and covered them with fake binding tests. Verified with examples/basic check and bun run check.
Fixed print preview root overflow so Browser Run full-page PNG exports include all handout slides.
Added CSS variable based built-in component colors, reusable deck theme helpers, theme registry resolution, sample theme usage, and docs/tests.
Implemented deck-local CSS theme convention, migrated sample decks, updated docs, and verified with check plus viewport smoke.
Added a sample decks facade that hides generated imports from app entry, updated tests/docs, and verified with bun run check.
Clarified src/decks.ts as an app-owned facade that is safe to edit, documented that compile owns only src/generated/decks.ts, and added a regression assertion for the comment.
Added hono-decks init for app-owned decks facades, updated README guidance, and verified with bun run check.
Aligned the basic example with src/decks.ts, optional src/decks.config.ts, and generated/decks.ts structure; verified with bun run check.
Added defineDecksConfig, moved sample R2/export/mount settings into default decks.config.ts, updated docs/tests, and verified with bun run check.
Added DeckExportOptions.authorize, hid unauthorized export links, returned 403 on direct unauthorized export routes, documented usage, and verified with bun run check.

Split server router, node build-time API, and MDX generator responsibilities into focused modules while preserving public imports. Verified with targeted package tests, examples/basic test, and bun run check.
Added docs/slide-transitions-plan.md with the Slidev-style built-in transition plan.

Implemented Slidev-style built-in slide transitions without slide/zoom backward compatibility: deck-level defaults, expanded transition values, transition-aware runtime state, CSS hooks, docs, samples, and tests. Verified with targeted tests, bun run check, and viewport smoke.
Applied incoming slide transition preset to both outgoing and incoming slides; verified with tests and viewport smoke.
Polished slide transitions with transitionend completion, pending navigation queue, deck/slide timing frontmatter, updated samples/docs/tests, and viewport smoke verification.
Hardened transition timing validation and completion gating; verified with package tests, check, and viewport smoke.
Implemented configurable default viewer back link and exposed it to render overrides.
Replaced fixed viewer controls with an item model, removed viewer.backLink, added items(defaults, context), and verified with router tests plus bun run check.
Applied viewer controls items(defaults, context) in examples/basic, updated sample viewer link styling, and covered the behavior in worker tests.
Moved the basic controls item API example into decks.config.ts and changed the sample facade to merge viewer overrides so index.ts can add head without replacing configured controls.
Moved the router-wide sample viewer head option into decks.config.ts and left only route-specific embed controls override in index.ts.
Implemented controls diff options, JSX render items, renderItem support, updated exports, tests, and the basic example.
Hardened existing controls behavior without adding API: documented precedence, filtered unsafe attributes and href schemes, bound duplicate action controls, and added coverage.
Exported DeckViewerExportPaths through server/router, mod, and top-level index because it appears in createDeckViewerParts public signature.
Documented controls precedence and async viewer parts behavior, and added controlsHtml export/invariant coverage.
Documented the Core Publish V1 scope, including goals, non-goals, public API, route surface, assets, controls, export, custom pages, runtime boundary, and verification expectations.

Revised V1 planning docs to include projection and presenter routes, MDX-comment speaker notes, presenter layout expectations, and app-owned OGP metadata sample while deferring sync/share-image/platform concerns.
Implemented V1 presentation routes, speaker notes parsing, presenter view, and OGP sample
Fixed presenter previews by rendering static preview slides with active state
Fixed presenter next preview by scaling full-size slides inside the preview viewport
Kept the presenter no-next placeholder at the same 16:9 preview height
Implemented presenter route gating and optional viewer control link config with tests and sample config.
Removed completed implementation-plan markdown files and verified no markdown references to deleted plan filenames remain.
Consolidated unfinished docs into docs/remaining-work.md, deleted other docs markdown files, and updated README links to avoid deleted docs references.
Added deterministic OGP cache support for compileDecks and CLI, wired the basic example to a committed OGP cache, and verified focused package/sample tests plus example compile.
Improved presenter workflow with disabled-control safety, string env gates, presenter controls/status UI, and postMessage source/origin guards; verified focused package/sample tests.
Implemented dynamic viewport sizing, safe-area support, in-flow controls, narrow-screen spacing, and portrait/landscape smoke assertions.
Implemented responsive utility rail, subtle page overlay, transparent half-slide tap targets, swipe navigation, and portrait-mobile landscape fullscreen locking; tests and design QA pass.
Added justify-content:center to the viewer stage, verified targeted and full suites, and confirmed the live Tunnel serves the centered rule.
Added the default desktop print-route control and coarse-pointer CSS hiding print/fullscreen; updated docs and verified all tests plus live Tunnel output.
Fixed print CSS specificity and print layout flow, added Cmd/Ctrl+P routing to the A4 print page with automatic print dialog, verified Chrome PDF output and all 201 tests.
Package rename and all verification completed in e5622b8.
Added the live homepage deck embed and bilingual configuration guide; desktop/mobile browser QA and all quality gates pass.

Removed the 12px viewer-shell gap, rewrote Japanese documentation copy across home, guides, navigation, and API reference, replaced generic demo slogans, and verified desktop/mobile layouts plus the full Bun quality gate.

Removed the viewer-shell gap, rewrote Japanese docs copy, and fixed responsive heading breaks so Japanese words and particles stay in natural units. Verified desktop/mobile rendering, all repository checks, and the final docs check.
Raised embedded viewer controls above the navigation hit layers, added regression coverage, and verified in Chrome that fullscreen is the click target and slide state does not change.
Relaxed the desktop hero by reducing the Japanese headline within its grid column and normalizing hero spacing; verified desktop/mobile layouts, layout detector, tests, and production build.

Reworked every guide and API group around first-deck success and progressive disclosure; added complete setup steps, task-based explanations, API use cases, bilingual tests, detector checks, full quality gates, and desktop/mobile browser QA.
Fast-forwarded codex/document-policy-honox-docs into main and passed the full bun run check quality gate.
Closed
Implemented Vite and Wrangler dev lifecycle integration; verified initial compile, live MDX rebuilds, builds, tests, and standalone package.
Implemented and verified browserless build-time OGP generation, static asset serving, social metadata, docs, and example.
Implemented and verified Vite full reload and Wrangler live reload integration.
Deployed examples/ogp to authenticated tsapp account and verified page, bot user-agent, OGP metadata, and 1200x630 PNG externally.
Added bilingual Browser Run export recipe with binding setup, compatibility and remote requirements, typed authorization, route flow, security guidance, tests, and passing docs check.

Reduced documentation page H1 sizing, added language-aware Shiki highlighting with exact-source copy support, expanded the bilingual authoring syntax reference, and verified docs tests/build plus responsive browser layouts.

Confirmed that GFM was implemented on an older divergent remote branch but was not carried into the API redesign, that the current public config has no remark plugin extension hook, and that fragment modes and aliases create avoidable authoring ambiguity. Recommended built-in GFM plus one reveal-oriented syntax before implementation.

GFM is enabled in both compilation paths, Fire replaces the built-in Fragment authoring component, docs and examples use Fire, compatibility decisions are tracked in hono-slides-7nq, and package/docs checks pass.

Fire authoring is consolidated on <Fire>, :::fire, and :::fire{each="item"}; $fire and fragments frontmatter are removed; DOM state uses fire naming; custom effects are documented and covered by CSS-variable tests; all relevant checks pass.
Implemented and verified the simplified Fire authoring contract.
Implemented, documented, and verified the recommended fire authoring API.
Implemented validated at scheduling, list depth/every grouping, concise GFM/Fire docs, and basic example coverage. Full bun run check passes.
Polished Japanese navigation and prose, documented Slidev inspiration, added npm/pnpm/Yarn/Bun guidance, and verified docs checks.
Added Vite/Wrangler NODE_ENV auto-detection with explicit override precedence and fail-closed behavior; updated examples and docs; all repository checks passed.
Documented explicit public export authorization and kept final presentation state stable; all repository checks pass.
ドキュメントの公開範囲・既定ルート・設定の優先順位・watch・URL状態を明確化し、トップページを実例中心に簡素化。型検査、全テスト、OGP/ドキュメントビルドを通過。
basicへWrangler 4.110を明示し起動を復旧。fire非表示時のvisibility切替をトランジション完了後へ変更し、透明オーバーレイの送り・戻しを回帰スモーク対象に追加。全checkと実ブラウザー確認を通過。
スワイプ後に互換clickが発生しない場合も残っていた抑止フラグをイベントループ終了時に解除。次の通常クリックが矢印キーと同じfire状態遷移へ進むよう修正し、スワイプ後クリックの回帰ケースを追加。全check成功。
スワイプ抑止の残留を解消し、透明オーバーレイクリック後のフォーカスをviewportへ戻して後続キー操作も統一。実ブラウザーでstep=1とviewportフォーカスを確認し、全check成功。
Closed
Closed
codex/api-dx-redesignをde47027までmainへfast-forwardし、origin/mainへpush。mainとorigin/mainの差分0/0を確認。
Closed
Closed
Closed
Aligned the initial release to 0.1.0, corrected pre-1.0 release rules, regenerated the example tarball and lockfile, added MIT license files, and passed the full repository check.
Migrated lint, format, tests, Vite dev/build scripts, and CI to Vite+ 0.2.4; full check passes.
Published hono-decks@0.1.0 to npm, verified registry metadata, and pushed v0.1.0 pointing to 62c87ab.
Default package README is now English, the complete Japanese guide is preserved as README.ja.md, both are linked and included in npm pack, and all checks pass.
Deployed the indexable documentation site at hono-decks.com and noindex standalone examples on custom subdomains; verified mobile layout and navigation.
Updated repository and Deploy to Cloudflare links for the hono-decks repository rename.
Generated Hono flame + stacked slide icon, derived favicon and app-icon sizes, integrated metadata/header mark, and verified docs tests/build.
Added an English-first root README and a Japanese README with reciprocal language navigation; verified structure, whitespace, and Japanese lint.
Verified docs header and favicon integration, added the Hono Decks icon to English and Japanese root READMEs, and passed docs tests/build.
Deployed the current docs build, replaced the live legacy h header mark with the Hono Decks icon, fixed production favicon link rendering, and verified all live assets return 200.
Documentation copy and layout polished in Japanese and English, verified, and deployed.
TypeScript 7.0.2 support completed with tsdown migration; full check, dependency review, and Node 22/24 package smoke are green.
Resolved all 15 Code Scanning alerts; focused regressions, repository check, package smoke, PR CI, and CodeQL merge-ref scan are green with zero open alerts.
